texto: How can one go from good [auspicious state] to pure (state)? There are no words for it. It will happen when the Gnani Purush (the enlightened one) gives the awareness of the Self
autor: it will happen when He bestows God’s grace upon you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de it will happen when He bestows God’s grace upon you. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “How can one go from good [auspicious state] to pure (state)? There are no words for it. It will h…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, dada-bhagwan, state, com foco em reflexao.
